title: Adversarial Attacks Toolkit
tagline: Adversarial Examples in CNNs implemented with PyTorch
description: Explores adversarial attacks and defenses on CNNs; includes training, attacks (CW/FGSM/PGD), TRADES.

title: C++ Kalman Filter Package
tagline: Kalman Filter in ROS implemented in C++
description: ROS package implementing a Kalman filter; C++ with CMake, designed for robotics pipelines.

title: Data Visualization Gallery
description: A collection of visualization experiments using real-world data.

title: Animated Visualization Demos
tagline: Simple animations based on various datasets
description: Code-based data visualization animations built with Python and Matplotlib, animating temperature patterns over Greece, and other datasets.
